mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_enrollments WHERE user_id = #{userId}) AS courseCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM peer_review_assignments WHERE reviewer_id = #{userId} AND status = 'pending') AS pendingReviews, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submissions WHERE student_id = #{userId}) AS submissionCount

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM courses WHERE teacher_id = #{teacherId}) AS courseCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignments a INNER JOIN courses c ON a.course_id = c.course_id WHERE c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND a.status = 'published') AS publishedAssignments, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM appeals a INNER JOIN peer_review_assignments pra ON a.pra_id = pra.pra_id INNER JOIN assignments asgn ON pra.assignment_id = asgn.assignment_id INNER JOIN courses c ON asgn.course_id = c.course_id WHERE c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND a.status = 'pending') AS pendingAppeals
